Detroit's Welding Experts

Precision welding for Michigan's toughest conditions. Serving Detroit and surrounding areas with durable solutions built to last.

Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Marcus T.

Apex saved our Corktown loft building when an inspection revealed severe beam corrosion. They engineered a solution that preserved the historic character while bringing everything up to code. Two winters later, their welds are holding perfect.

D
Danielle K.

Our Indian Village home needed period-appropriate steel casement window frames replicated. Apex studied original 1927 examples, then fabricated perfect matches down to the original weld bead pattern. The preservation commission approved them without changes.

R
Rob S.

After three shops told me my '68 Mustang's frame rails were too far gone, Apex methodically replaced 18 inches of structural steel using correct resistance spot welds. The car drives straight and the repair is invisible to judges at shows.

L
Lena P.

When our bakery's conveyor oven frame cracked during peak holiday production, Apex had a crew onsite in 45 minutes. They reinforced the entire structure overnight with food-grade stainless - we only lost 4 hours of baking time.

Apex Welding — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every welding project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Welding Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific welding needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Detroit & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Detroit, MI and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Detroit
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our welding services.

How do you prevent heat distortion in thin steel?

We use pulsed MIG welding with precise heat control, often working in 2-inch sections with cooling periods. For critical applications, we employ specialized backstep techniques.

Can you match original weld appearances?

Yes. Our team studies period-appropriate techniques - from 1940s stick welds to modern flux-core - to maintain visual continuity in historic properties.

Built on Detroit Values

Call 555-WEL-RQ13 today for welding that stands up to Michigan winters.

Let's Begin →
